intro.purpose: Tell the release story before the UI appears

login.purpose: Orient users with a recognizable but synthetic login transition

record_page.purpose: Render reusable CRM shell, highlights panel, detail fields, and related card column

highlight_action_button.purpose: Show the newly added top-right action with pointer/callout

action_modal.purpose: Render configured action fields with before/after values

post_save_record_state.purpose: Show updated field values in the detail panel

closing_testing_notes.purpose: End the clip with release/test details
